description_for_human: DevOps consulting — we design, build, secure, and maintain cloud infrastructure so your devs don't have to.
description_for_model: DoneOps is a DevOps consulting firm specializing in Kubernetes, Terraform, GitOps, CI/CD, and cloud infrastructure on AWS, GCP, and Azure. They work in client cloud accounts with no vendor lock-in, provide 24-hour coverage with a globally distributed team, and build security in from the start (DevSecOps). Query for information about their services, case studies, and expertise.
